description: Vehicle Registration Renewal — processes annual registration renewals, validates emissions compliance, insurance verification, and outstanding violation checks

hard_stops.label: Insurance Not Verified
hard_stops.logic: Vehicle insurance policy could not be verified through the state insurance verification system — registration cannot be renewed without active coverage

hard_stops.label: Emissions Test Expired or Failed
hard_stops.logic: Emissions/smog test is expired or vehicle failed the most recent test — renewal blocked per Clean Air Act compliance

hard_stops.label: Outstanding Parking or Traffic Violations
hard_stops.logic: Vehicle has unresolved parking or traffic violations with court holds — registration renewal blocked until violations cleared

hard_stops.label: Registration Fee Not Paid
hard_stops.logic: Annual registration fee payment not confirmed — cannot issue renewal sticker without payment

soft_flags.label: Late Renewal
soft_flags.logic: Registration is being renewed more than 30 days after expiration — late fees may apply

soft_flags.label: Address Change Detected
soft_flags.logic: Owner's address on file differs from the address provided — may need to update records and reassess county fees
